title: Ubiquiti UA-G2-Pro - UniFi Access Reader G2 Professional, black
description: UniFi Access Reader G2 Professional is an NFC reader with a touch screen for entering an access PIN and is part of the UniFi Access solution. The reader for communicating with other elements uses a LAN port with 802.3af PoE support, it is easy to install under the plaster, it has an IP55 degree of protection and supports the latest NFC security standards (13.56 MHz) including MIFARE DESFire encryption encrypted with AES-128. Unlocking the door is quick and secure using an NFC card or a mobile… NFC Tag 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 MIFARE Classic MIFARE Plus MIFARE Ultralight MIFARE DESFire Elegant NFC and Bluetooth access reader (UniFi identity) Power supply via 802.3af PoE using UniFi Access Hub Advanced NFC security (MIFARE DESFire) Unlock with PIN on the touch screen IP55 protection against water Mobile access with app (1.5.9+) Device (UA-G2-Pro) Wall mounting box Screws
